title: Inventory facility-level medical oxygen reliability data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory classifies oxygen-system data sources by facility grain, reliability definition, component coverage, geography, access, and known measurement limits.
inputs: WHO statement on access to quality and safe medical oxygen
National and international health facility assessment instruments
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source URL, source date, facility sampling frame, reliability and component definitions, access conditions, and explicit limitations against the source document.
done_condition: At least five candidate sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected, with explicit reasons covering facility grain, reliability definition, component coverage, access, and known self-report or temporal limitations.

title: Audit definitions of reliable and functional oxygen availability
outcome: A crosswalk shows which facility indicators measure presence, function, continuity, quality, or patient delivery and prevents them being treated as interchangeable.
expected_artifact: validation.md definition crosswalk and exclusion rules.
validation_method: Replicator applies the crosswalk to a sample of source fields and confirms that each field has one declared interpretation and denominator.
done_condition: No source field labelled reliable, functional, or available remains unclassified by the crosswalk or without a stated denominator and observation window.

title: Red-team oxygen reliability findings before financing use
outcome: A failure-mode review blocks unsupported facility rankings, procurement prescriptions, and clinical interpretations of reliability data.
expected_artifact: outputs.md red-team section with blocked uses and required review gates.
validation_method: Red-team reviewer tests each proposed use against self-report bias, missingness, demand surges, equipment donation incentives, and clinical non-equivalence; a second reviewer independently replicates the failure-mode check and confirms the blocks.
done_condition: Every candidate financing or clinical interpretation is either supported by a named denominator and replicated review status or explicitly blocked with a documented failure mode.
